reviews.author: Trish Hoang
reviews.text: Bu Gia Map National Park is a truly amazing natural wonder that every nature lover should experience. I had an unforgettable adventure trekking with knowledgeable park rangers who guided me safely through the lush forest, crossing crystal-clear streams and immersing myself in the pristine environment. Camping overnight under a starlit sky added an extra layer of magic, allowing me to feel the incredible energy of nature up close. Before venturing further into the forest, I highly recommend stopping by the animal rescue station. There, you can witness the touching efforts of dedicated park rangers as they care for wild animals that have been hunted or injured. This experience not only deepened my appreciation for wildlife conservation but also highlighted the commitment to nurturing and protecting these vulnerable creatures. Overall, Bu Gia Map National Park offers a perfect blend of adventure, natural beauty, and meaningful conservation efforts. It’s an experience you shouldn’t miss.

reviews.author: Luong Nguyen
reviews.text: I just went through the park by my motobike. There is bamboo forest along the street and it is very quiet and peaceful. If you'd like to enjoy the nature, fresh air then this is a right place for motobike tour but the street is not so smooth, the surface of the road is degraded and needs to be renew and it is so narrow. You need to go slowly and carefully.

reviews.author: Colbert Woods
reviews.text: Don’t go there. Even with a TRC, you’re not allowed to enter without the proper paperwork. How to get those papers and which papers is the real question. Given how close it is to the Cambodian border, the restrictions are understandable, but any information or guidance would be appreciated. It also seems like the area has been closed for quite some time I’m not entirely sure why.

reviews.author: jdb22
reviews.text: a very good place to visit and explore nature with friends or families... best place to unplug from technology... a beautiful forest/natural park... forest guides are friendly and experts in what they do... i’m just hoping that campers, hikers and visitors avoid throwing trash (candy and food wrappers) anywhere in the campsite and along the trail...

reviews.author: David Nguyen
reviews.text: Visit Bu Gia Map National Forest in the most beautiful time in the end of Apr, early May, when millions of butterfly migrate to somewhere secret deep inside the forest for mating season.

reviews.author: Yong Ruan
reviews.text: The forest near HCMCity. 2 days turn off mobile. We have chance to touch the real nature in Bu Gia Map forest. We see more the huge trees, listen deeply the waterfall, look at your friends's eye. We talk each others more in face to face, don't watch your FB, youtube and Netflix. Appreciate the god, family to have me a chance to see beautiful world. Thankful

reviews.author: Nguyen Sang
reviews.text: Amazing to live with the nature. Long ride from HCMC around 8 hours, but it is really worth for. You should go with the local tour guide here named Mr Giang, then you can enjoy the forest cusine and the very special experirment here.

reviews.author: Linh Vuong
reviews.text: Just 3 hrs drive from ho chi minh to BU GIA MAP, we was back to nature where we left our work, our phone, our busy life … outside of forest for 2 day 1. I had choosed HÀNH TRÌNH BU GIA MẬP who was organising the gruop tour, they did excellent job by friendly guide- helpful porter- good cook team. I enjoyed so much.. it worth for package tour ( value for money) . I will back with them for another tour and will introduce to Al my friend who love trekking

reviews.author: O.A.C.H Travel
reviews.text: Absolutely stunning! The National Park covers parts of both provinces, Binh Phuoc and Dak Nong. It was feasible to navigate the former part with a motorbike, but not the case for the latter one, since roads in the Dak Nong region were still dirt. We met a "jungle man" who have lived in the jungle for over 20 years. He was surprisingly socially knowledgeable, since approximately each month he got to the town for exchanging foods and gasoline. The dirt bike in one photo was his.

reviews.author: Hào Nguyễn Thế
reviews.text: This is the best place for who wanna discover nature

reviews.author: Ridley Moorman
reviews.text: Has anyone seen remains of an Army helicopter in the park? We had one shot down around there, full of soldiers, February 18,1970.

reviews.author: Dat Tran
reviews.text: Really nice place. It you love nature and phươt. Have to been there

reviews.author: Hiep Duong
reviews.text: The best place for trekking but not recommended for expats due to this is the border zone

reviews.author: Sophia Tran
reviews.text: Nice place, beautiful nature for short trekking tour

reviews.author: Minh Nguyễn Giang Trọng
reviews.text: View very nice. Service is good

reviews.author: Lam Nguyen
reviews.text: Beautiful nature, one of few national parks in Vietnam.

reviews.author: Nam Nguyen
reviews.text: Very beautiful offroad for mountain bike

reviews.author: Khoi Bui
reviews.text: Great place to get close to the nature. Peaceful and relaxing

reviews.author: Loan Nguyễn
reviews.text: Amazing place with beautiful waterfalls, uncountable species of insects, animals, and plants. A great experience for any nature lover. The guides are extremely knowledgeable and helpful. The lychee could be either a nightmare or a memorable experience. The forest is under well reservation so the air is very fresh with many types of plants

reviews.author: Ben Hyra
reviews.text: fantastic 1hr motorbike ride through some lush bamboo forests. although the only animals we saw were some wild dogs that chased us and snapped at our heels. excellent experience, and completely free to boot!

reviews.author: H10 G
reviews.text: Peaceful village of local people.

reviews.author: L. D
reviews.text: I pass by road who follow Cambodgia border. I see bottle, and wast, Is sad. After forest very beautiful, nice tree, very relax. Ciment road, at correct. Use bike, motorbike. Interesting day travelling

reviews.author: minh minh
reviews.text: Great place to trekking for beginner

reviews.author: Anh Thu Tran Nguyen
reviews.text: nice place but mot recommended if you don’t want to get woken up at 5am by howling monkeys.

reviews.author: totanlinh
reviews.text: Nice to take pictures and good for exploring, but do not take national road 14C if not sure where you need to go

reviews.author: Nhan LE
reviews.text: There are many tours for exploring park. Trek to forrest, water falls is amazing. Friendly tourguide, forrest food.

reviews.author: Nick Nguyen
reviews.text: Ideal place to trek and discover yourself
